# MemoryOS APK

Download the MemoryOS APK, an offline Android memory timeline with local nodes, source controls, trails, summaries, and Markdown export.

Download: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/memoryos/assets/memoryos.apk
Canonical: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/memoryos/
Author: Tanzir Rahman, https://tanziro.com
Package: com.memoryos.memoryos
Version: 1.0.0+1
APK size: 50.1 MB
SHA256: 1c337736ca1daa72b291239910c6e1b94f1236e5af5e8f022ac4109615bbafdc

Important: This APK is vibe-coded, has limited testing, and ships with no warranty. Users should read the permissions and install at their own risk.
